title: New Digital Skills Index from Salesforce Reveals 76% of Global Workers Say They Are Unequipped for the Future of Work
text: SAN FRANCISCO, Jan. 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Salesforce, the global leader in CRM, today published its new Global Digital Skills Index , revealing a growing global digital skills crisis and an urgent need for action. The Salesforce Index is based on over 23,000 workers in 19 countries reporting their readiness to acquire key digital skills.

title: Salesforce Grants Equity Awards to Narrative Science Employees Under Its Inducement Equity Incentive Plan
text: SAN FRANCISCO, Jan. 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Salesforce (NYSE: CRM), the global leader in CRM, today announced it has granted equity awards under its 2014 Inducement Equity Incentive Plan (the "Plan") to new employees who joined Salesforce in connection with the acquisition of Narrative Science. The Plan was adopted by the Salesforce Board of Directors in July 2014, in accordance with New York Stock Exchange Rule 303A.08.

title: Microsoft, Salesforce and Apple cutting about 116 points off the Dow's price
text: The Dow Jones Industrial Average DJIA, +0.24% is rising 47 points, or 0.1%, to buck the selloff in the broader market, but it be up a lot more if it wasn't for the blue-chip barometer's biggest technology components. The biggest drag on the Dow is Microsoft Corp.'s stock MSFT, -2.38% , which is down $8.64, or 2.7%, followed by fellow software giant Salesforce.com Inc. shares CRM, -2.63% , which shed $7.22, or 3.0%.

title: Salesforce Announces Tools for NFT Marketplaces, Virtual Environments, Social Commerce, More
text: Salesforce on Thursday (Jan. 13) debuted several new innovations and partnerships it will use to help companies build non-fungible token (NFT) marketplaces, virtual environments, social commerce capabilities and connect data across platforms.  Origin Protocol and Topia are calling on Salesforce to power NFT platforms and metaverse experiences.

title: Salesforce Fuels the Future of Commerce with New Innovations and Partnerships
text: SAN FRANCISCO, Jan. 13, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Salesforce, [NYSE: CRM], the global leader in CRM, today announced a series of new innovations and partnerships to power the future of commerce , enabling companies to modernize their systems, develop more flexible digital strategies, and connect with their customers wherever they are. "Today, consumers expect retailers to offer their products anytime, anywhere, and this is transforming the shopping experience," said Lidiane Jones, EVP & GM, Salesforce Digital Experiences.

title: Salesforce Data Reveals Global Digital Sales Surpassed $1 Trillion During 2021 Holiday Season
text: SAN FRANCISCO, Jan. 12, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Salesforce (NYSE: CRM), the global leader in CRM, today released its 2021 Holiday Shopping Report, which analyzes shopping data from over one billion shoppers on the Salesforce Customer 360 platform and activity across commerce, marketing, and service (including 24 of the top 30 U.S. online retailers). While Cyber Week saw muted digital growth in 2021, early November and late December surges helped retailers break new sales records.

title: Salesforce Executives to Participate in Upcoming Investor Events
text: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Salesforce (NYSE: CRM), the global leader in CRM, today announced that Salesforce executives will participate in the following investor events on Wednesday, Jan. 12, 2022: Stewart Butterfield, President & CEO, Slack, will participate in the Wolfe Research Future of Work Virtual Bus Tour at 10:00 a.m. (PT) / 1:00 p.m. (ET). Bill Patterson, EVP & GM, CRM Applications, will participate in the Jefferies Virtual Software Summit at 12:00 p.m. (PT) / 3:00 p.m. (ET). Webcasts will be available on Salesforce’s website at www.salesforce.com/investor. About Salesforce Salesforce, the global CRM leader, empowers companies of every size and industry to digitally transform and create a 360° view of their customers. For more information about Salesforce (NYSE: CRM), visit: www.salesforce.com.
